task_description: Add Twilio SIP integration for outbound calls to the device-control package. Implements TwilioPhoneProvider (dual-mode: real Twilio SDK when credentials present, mock when absent), CallSessionManager state machine, TwiML builder, NativePhoneProvider fallback, and CallAgent for Quant Live voice intents.

verification.summary: Typecheck clean, all 61 tests pass (44 new + 17 existing). Two review rounds completed: v1 fixed XML injection, live mode degradation, listener cleanup, and added NativePhoneProvider tests. v2 fixed require() in ESM by using dynamic import() in initialize(). All issues resolved.
